actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour 172617727 on GameObject 'LeftHand Ray Controller' uses script guid cf14522d53cc1594991c164e785780dc (ToggleRay). Serialized config: forceToggle=false, directInteractor=fileID 235308789. Requires XRRayInteractor present (per [RequireComponent]). To cover public methods, ensure directInteractor is not touching any objects (TouchingObject()==false) so ActivateRay switches on ray; after delay, call DeactivateRay to switch it off.

MonoBehaviour 1287520551 on GameObject 'RightHand Ray Controller' uses script guid cf14522d53cc1594991c164e785780dc (ToggleRay). Serialized config in scene: forceToggle=false, directInteractor=fileID 474225665. [RequireComponent(typeof(XRRayInteractor))] implies XRRayInteractor present. To exercise public methods, ensure the direct interactor has no valid targets (TouchingObject()==false) so ActivateRay will call SwitchInteractors(true); after a short delay, call DeactivateRay to revert (SwitchInteractors(false)).
